ARIA Widget Pattern Violations Test Page

These ARIA widgets violate required composition patterns: tablist without tabs, combobox without aria-expanded, menu without menuitems.

Tablist with no tabs:

Not a tab
Also not a tab

Combobox without aria-expanded:

United States

Menu with no menuitems:

Not a menuitem
